title: onoclea struthiopteris
intro: Onoclea struthiopteris, also known as the ostrich fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the Osmundaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Onoclea struthiopteris include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
